skill.name: prettify-pdf
skill.description: Redesign or QA PDFs for clarity while preserving IDs, dates, amounts, barcodes, QR codes, seals, signatures, labels, and meaning. Use for receipts, invoices, forms, tickets, resumes, reports.
skill.summary: Redesign or QA PDFs for clarity while preserving IDs, dates, amounts, barcodes, QR codes, seals, signatures, labels, and meaning.
skill.author: sethupavan12

security_audit.summary: All 474 static analysis findings were evaluated and determined to be false positives. The majority of flags (285 'Ruby/shell backtick execution', 180+ 'Weak cryptographic algorithm', 40 'Hardcoded URL', 29 'filesystem') are pattern matches against documentation files (markdown code blocks showing commands, .gitignore entries, GitHub URLs, configuration flags, and text references). No actual malicious code, obfuscation, credential exfiltration, or network-based data leakage was found. The skill is a legitimate PDF redesign tool with transparent documentation. The only genuine risk factors are filesystem access (reading/writing PDF files) and external commands (invoking a Python helper script), both of which are necessary and documented features of the skill.

content.user_title: Redesign and QA PDFs While Keeping Every Detail Intact
content.value_statement: Standard PDF editing tools often alter or lose critical information like receipt numbers, dates, amounts, and barcodes. This skill teaches your AI agent to redesign PDFs for readability while preserving every fact, identifier, and machine-readable asset from the source document.
actual_capabilities: Redesign PDF receipts, invoices, forms, tickets, and reports for improved readability
Preserve exact values of IDs, dates, amounts, names, and other critical fields
Extract and preserve barcodes, QR codes, seals, signatures, and logos as source images
Create a preservation checklist of all critical facts before redesigning
Render final PDF to images and compare visually against the source document
Flag any clipped text, overlapping elements, or missing machine-readable assets
limitations: Cannot decode or verify the content of barcodes and QR codes
Scanned PDFs may have incomplete OCR and require manual visual verification
Does not perform OCR or text recognition on image-only PDFs
Optional helper script requires PyMuPDF and Pillow packages

use_cases.title: Redesign Payment Receipts for Customer Clarity
use_cases.description: An accountant takes a cluttered payment receipt and asks the agent to redesign it so the amount, date, transaction ID, and payer name are immediately visible while preserving the barcode and official seal.

use_cases.title: Process Government Forms for Easier Review
use_cases.description: An HR administrator uploads a multi-page government application form and asks the agent to extract the most important fields into a summary card layout while keeping all original data intact.

use_cases.title: QA Redesigned PDFs Against Source Documents
use_cases.description: A developer runs a visual comparison between a redesigned invoice and the original, asking the agent to verify that every ID, date, amount, and QR code matches exactly with no clipping or overlap.
use_cases.target_user: Software developers doing document pipeline QA

prompt_templates.title: Basic PDF Redesign
prompt_templates.prompt: Use $prettify-pdf to redesign this PDF receipt. Keep all IDs, dates, amounts, and the barcode exactly as they appear in the original.
prompt_templates.scenario: Simple one-step redesign of a receipt or invoice

prompt_templates.title: Structured Redesign with Priority Fields
prompt_templates.prompt: Use $prettify-pdf to redesign this appointment confirmation letter. Put the date, time, location, applicant name, and reference number in a highlighted summary strip at the top. Keep all other fields in clearly labeled sections below.
prompt_templates.scenario: Redesigning a form or letter with specific field priority

prompt_templates.title: QA Verification Against Original
prompt_templates.prompt: Use $prettify-pdf to QA this redesigned invoice against the original PDF. Find any changed IDs, totals, dates, payment terms, missing logo, missing barcode, or layout collisions. Report each discrepancy found.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quality assurance pass on an already-redesigned document

prompt_templates.title: Advanced Custom Layout with Source Preservation
prompt_templates.prompt: Use $prettify-pdf to redesign this multi-page report. Create a one-page executive summary card with title, date, total, and key action items. Keep full detail pages after it. Preserve all original headers, footers, logos, and legal disclaimers exactly. Use green for confirmed totals and amber for deadlines.
prompt_templates.scenario: Complex multi-page document with custom layout requirements

output_examples.input: A dense payment receipt PDF with a transaction ID, date, fee breakdown, barcode, and government seal scattered across the page
output_examples.output: A redesigned receipt where the total amount, transaction ID, date, and payer name appear in a clean summary card at the top. Fee line items are in a sorted table below. The barcode and seal are preserved as source images. All values match the original exactly.

output_examples.input: An appointment confirmation letter with date, time, location, applicant details, reference number, and a list of required documents
output_examples.output: A redesigned confirmation with a priority card showing date, time, location, and reference number in large readable text. Required documents are listed with clear checkboxes. The applicant name and all original details are preserved below in labeled sections.

output_examples.input: An original invoice and a redesigned version for QA comparison
output_examples.output: A verification report listing all critical fields checked. Invoice number, date, line items, total, and QR code all match. No text clipping or overlaps found. The redesigned version passes QA with all assets preserved.

best_practices: Always create a preservation list of all IDs, dates, amounts, and machine-readable assets before starting any redesign
Render the final PDF to images and compare visually against the source to catch layout issues that text extraction misses
Keep exact original values in their own labeled fields and add friendly interpretations as supplements, never as replacements
anti_patterns: Reformatting or normalizing IDs, timestamps, or amounts can break downstream verification processes - always copy exact source values
Relabeling ambiguous adjacent text into a guessed relationship changes the document meaning - keep original labels and value groupings
Applying decorative effects like gradients, low-contrast text, or fake stamps reduces trust and may confuse automated verification systems

faq.question: Does this skill require an API key or internet connection?
faq.answer: No. The skill is designed to work locally with no API keys, hosted services, or internet connection required.

faq.question: Can this skill decode barcodes or QR codes?
faq.answer: No. It preserves barcode and QR code images exactly from the source, but does not decode or verify their content.

faq.question: What file types does this skill work with?
faq.answer: It works with any PDF file your AI agent can open. For scanned PDFs, OCR quality depends on your environment, not on this skill.

faq.question: Does this skill change the values in my document?
faq.answer: No. The core rule of this skill is to preserve all IDs, dates, amounts, names, and machine-readable assets exactly as they appear in the source.

faq.question: What tools does the optional helper script need?
faq.answer: The helper script scripts/pdf_guardrails.py requires PyMuPDF and optionally Pillow. These are not required for the skill to function.

faq.question: How do I install this skill for Claude Code?
faq.answer: Clone the repository into your skills directory at $HOME/.claude/skills/prettify-pdf or use npx skills add sethupavan12/prettify-pdf.
